question: How do I create a Nimbus account?
answer: Go to nimbus.io/signup, enter your email and a password, then verify your email address using the link we send you. You'll be prompted to create your first folder as soon as you log in.
keywords: sign up register new account create

question: Can I use Nimbus without installing any software?
answer: Yes. Nimbus works fully in your browser at app.nimbus.io. Installing the desktop or mobile app is optional and only needed if you want automatic folder syncing.
keywords: web browser without app install no download

question: Which devices and platforms does Nimbus support?
answer: Nimbus has apps for Windows, macOS, Linux, iOS, and Android, plus a web app that works in any modern browser.
keywords: platforms os windows mac linux iphone android compatible

question: What plans does Nimbus offer?
answer: Nimbus has three plans: Free (5GB), Plus ($4.99/month, 200GB), and Pro ($12.99/month, 2TB with advanced sharing controls). All paid plans include a 14-day free trial.
keywords: pricing plans cost price tiers subscription options

question: How do I cancel my subscription?
answer: Open Settings > Billing > Manage Subscription and select Cancel Plan. You'll keep paid features until the end of your current billing cycle, then automatically move to the Free plan.
keywords: cancel stop end subscription unsubscribe downgrade

question: Do you offer refunds?
answer: We offer a full refund within 14 days of your first payment on a new subscription. Contact support@nimbus.io with your account email to request one.
keywords: refund money back reimburse return payment charge

question: Can I switch between monthly and yearly billing?
answer: Yes, go to Settings > Billing > Change Billing Cycle. Switching to yearly applies immediately and gives you a discount; switching to monthly takes effect at your next renewal.
keywords: annual monthly yearly billing cycle switch change discount

question: How much storage do I get on the free plan?
answer: The Free plan includes 5GB of storage. You can earn up to an extra 2GB by referring friends who sign up and verify their account.
keywords: free storage space gb limit how much

question: Why is my folder not syncing?
answer: Syncing usually pauses because of a weak internet connection, a full local disk, or the app being paused manually. Check the sync icon in your system tray or menu bar, then try Settings > Sync > Resume Sync.
keywords: sync not working stuck updating between devices files stopped syncing

question: Is there a file size limit for uploads?
answer: Free and Plus accounts can upload files up to 10GB each. Pro accounts can upload files up to 100GB each.
keywords: file size limit max upload large

question: Can I recover a file I deleted by accident?
answer: Yes. Deleted files stay in your Trash for 30 days and can be restored from there. After 30 days they're permanently removed unless you're on the Pro plan, which keeps a 180-day version history.
keywords: recover restore undelete deleted file trash accident

question: How do I share a folder with someone else?
answer: Right-click any folder and choose Share, then enter the person's email or generate a public link. You can set the link to view-only or allow editing, and add an expiration date on the Pro plan.
keywords: share sharing link collaborate invite folder access

question: Is my data encrypted?
answer: Yes. Files are encrypted with AES-256 while stored on our servers and with TLS 1.3 while in transit between your device and Nimbus.
keywords: encryption encrypted secure security data protection

question: Does Nimbus support two-factor authentication?
answer: Yes, you can enable two-factor authentication under Settings > Security using an authenticator app or SMS codes. We strongly recommend turning it on.
keywords: two factor authentication 2fa mfa login security code

question: Who can see the files I store on Nimbus?
answer: Only you and anyone you explicitly share a file or folder with can see it. Nimbus staff cannot access the contents of your files except in rare cases required by law, which are logged and disclosed in our transparency report.
keywords: privacy who can see access staff view files

question: I forgot my password, how do I reset it?
answer: Click Forgot Password on the login screen and enter your account email. We'll send a reset link that's valid for one hour.
keywords: forgot password reset login cant login locked out

question: The desktop app is running slowly, what should I do?
answer: Try pausing sync, restarting the app, and checking for updates under Help > Check for Updates. If it's still slow, large folders with many small files can be excluded from sync in Settings > Selective Sync.
keywords: slow lag performance freeze laggy app issue

question: How do I contact customer support?
answer: Email support@nimbus.io or use the chat bubble in the bottom-right of the web app. Pro plan customers get priority support with a typical response time under 2 hours.
keywords: contact support help human agent talk to someone
